text: As I leave the room, glancing back through the glass wall, I feel a curious blend of separation and connection. The hum of conversation continues inside, but I slip into the hallway, strands of hair briefly veiling my view. There is a sense of transition—of moving from one world to another—tinged with the subtle melancholy of parting and the anticipation of what lies ahead. Goodbye echoes both as an ending and an invitation to return.
